title: Definition of Worker-on-Leave/Vacationing Worker
content: A land based Overseas Filipino Worker (OFW) who is in the country for a vacation (Annual leave/emergency leave) and who is returning to the same employer to resume employment is considered a worker-on-leave/vacationing worker.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
